image:image.image:title: Saffron of Kashmir — Royal Harvest, Premium Kashmiri Mongra Saffron
image:image.image:caption: Pure Kashmiri Mongra Saffron hand-harvested at dawn in Pampore, Kashmir. Est. 2004.

image:image.image:title: 2-Gram Royal Mongra Saffron Tin — Saffron of Kashmir
image:image.image:caption: Hand-painted Kashmiri enamel tin containing 2g of 100% pure Mongra saffron. AED 55.

image:image.image:title: Kashmiri Mongra Saffron in Traditional Copper Bowl at Sunrise
image:image.image:caption: Pure Kashmiri Mongra saffron threads in an ornate copper bowl with saffron tea, Himalayan backdrop.

image:image.image:title: Saffron Harvest Fields in Pampore, Kashmir
image:image.image:caption: Workers hand-harvesting Crocus sativus flowers at dawn across the saffron fields of Pampore, Kashmir.

image:image.image:title: Hand-Picking Saffron Stigmas from Crocus Flower in Kashmir
image:image.image:caption: A skilled harvester carefully extracts the three crimson stigmas from a Crocus sativus flower in Pampore.

image:image.image:title: Saffron of Kashmir — Official Brand Logo
image:image.image:caption: The official gold seal of Saffron of Kashmir, Est. 2004.
